title: Mavity Lib
body:
Library/API for my mods so I don't have to keep recreating all of the code I need each time I start a mod.
For most mods that I have the energy to rewrite, this'll be a required dependency.
This project does depend on other projects for use. I'm yet to figure out how to bundle mods with each other on build, so for now you'll have to add them by hand.
Oh and you can use this if you want (mod developers), but really it's mostly something I'm going to use for myself.
But I will also be working on a wiki for usages. May be up to one week after changes to the mod before the wiki is up to date with said version (Or longer If I have no effort left).
Hey all
I have no idea who of you is using this, but this is buggy and outdated code. I cannot recommend it less. I won't take this down but please, I request you find a better library.
